sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَتِ الْبَلَدِيَّةُ مَكْتَبَةً عَامَّةً جَدِيدَةً فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Općina je otvorila novu javnu biblioteku u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: The municipality opened a new public library in the city center.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ الْمَكْتَبَةُ بِآلَافِ الْكُتُبِ فِي مُخْتَلَفِ الْمَجَالَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka je ispunjena hiljadama knjiga iz različitih oblasti.
sentences.translationEn: The library is filled with thousands of books in various fields.

sentences.arabic: يُوجَدُ أَيْضًا قِسْمٌ خَاصٌّ لِلْأَطْفَالِ لِتَشْجِيعِهِمْ عَلَى الْقِرَاءَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tu je i poseban odjel za djecu kako bi ih se podstaklo na čitanje.
sentences.translationEn: There is also a special section for children to encourage them to read.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلزُّوَّارِ اسْتِخْدَامُ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ مَجَّانًا دَاخِلَ الْمَبْنَى.
sentences.translation: Posjetioci mogu besplatno koristiti internet unutar zgrade.
sentences.translationEn: Visitors can use the internet for free inside the building.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعُ إِلَى نَشْرِ الثَّقَافَةِ بَيْنَ الشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat ima za cilj širenje kulture među mladima.
sentences.translationEn: This project aims to spread culture among young people.
